name: Kayle

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Divine Ascent
passive.description_source:
Innate:  Kayle ascends through four forms that each grant additional bonuses:
Level 1 - Zealous: Kayle's  basic attacks  on-attack grant her  stacking  attack speed, and at maximum stacks she also gains  move speed.
Level 6 - Arisen: Kayle gains  range and becomes a ranged champion.
Level 11 - Aflame: While at maximum stacks, Kayle's basic attacks launches a fire wave that deals magic damage.
Level 16 - Transcendent: Kayle is permanently at maximum stacks, in addition to gaining even more  range.

effects.description: Innate: Kayle ascends through four forms that each grant additional bonuses. She ascends upon spending a skill point at levels 1, 6, 11, and 16.

Level 1 - Zealous: Kayle's basic attacks on-attack generate a stack of Zeal for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent attacks and stacking up to 5 times. For each stack, she gains 6% bonus attack speed, up to a maximum of 30%. At max stacks, she becomes Exalted, gaining 10% bonus movement speed.
Level 6 - Arisen: Kayle becomes ranged and gains 350 bonus attack range for a total of 525.

Level 11 - Aflame: Kayle gains 10% bonus size. While Kayle is Exalted, her basic attacks on-attack also launch a wave of fire forward that deals 20 : 47 (based on level) (+ 10% bonus AD) (+ 25% AP) magic damage to all enemies it passes through. The wave is affected by critical strike modifiers.
Level 16 - Transcendent: Kayle gains an additional 100 bonus attack range for a total of 625, and permanently gains the full effects of Zealous.

passive.description: Innate: Kayle ascends through four forms that each grant additional bonuses. She ascends upon spending a skill point at levels 1, 6, 11, and 16.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Zealous The stacking bonus attack speed can be tracked on the HUD via a buff called Zeal, while the maximum stacks bonus grants the buff Exalted.

basic_ability_1.name: Radiant Blast
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Kayle summons a celestial sword that travels forward and expands upon hitting a target, dealing magic damage,  slowing, and reducing the  armor and  magic resist of all targets struck.

effects.context_notes: Active: Kayle conjures a portal and fires a celestial sword after 0.25 seconds, damaging and slowing enemies hit.
Active: Kayle conjures a portal and fires a celestial sword after 0.25 seconds, damaging and slowing enemies hit.

effects.description: The sword expands upon hitting an enemy, targets struck in the area are dealt magic damage, slowed for 2 seconds, and inflicted with 15% reduced armor and magic resistance for 4 seconds.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Kayle conjures a portal in front of her that faces the target direction, from which, after 0.25 seconds, a celestial sword launches forward.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Details This ability has a cast time and cast delay.

basic_ability_2.name: Celestial Blessing
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Kayle  heals herself and an allied champion. Additionally, both of them gains  move speed for a brief time.

effects.context_notes: Active: Kayle and the target allied champion are healed and gain bonus movement speed for 2 seconds.
Active: Kayle and the target allied champion are healed and gain bonus movement speed for 2 seconds.

effects.description: If cast without a valid target, or self-cast, Celestial Blessing will automatically target the closest allied champion in range, prioritizing the one with the lowest health.
Kayle can move during Celestial Blessing's cast time.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Kayle and the target allied champion are healed and gain bonus movement speed for 2 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Details Celestial Blessing's cast time does not interrupt movement and the effects are applied at the start.

basic_ability_3.name: Starfire Spellblade
basic_ability_3.description_source: Passive:  Kayle deals bonus magic damage on-hit.

effects.context_notes: Passive: Kayle deals bonus magic damage on-hit.

Active: Kayle kindles her blade, empowering her next basic attack within 6 seconds to have an uncancellable windup and deal additional bonus magic damage on-hit that is capped at 400 against monsters.

effects.description: Aflame Bonus: The attack explodes upon the target, dealing its damage to surrounding enemies and applying on-hit effects. This is affected by critical strike modifiers.
Starfire Spellblade resets Kayle's basic attack timer. Starfire Spellblade does not deal bonus damage against structures.

basic_ability_3.description: Passive: Kayle deals bonus magic damage on-hit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Details Starfire Spellblade deals: The physical damage part of both the attack and the explosion deals basic damage and spell damage.

ultimate.name: Divine Judgment
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Kayle grants herself or an allied champion  invulnerability for the next few seconds, and conjures flaming swords around herself.

effects.description: Active: Kayle grants herself or a target allied champion invulnerability for 2.5 seconds from the start of the cast time, and conjures flaming swords around herself.

effects.context_notes: After 2.5 seconds, Divine Judgment rains swords around the protected target to deal magic damage to nearby enemies.

effects.description: Kayle can move during Divine Judgment's cast time.

ultimate.description: Active: Kayle grants herself or a target allied champion invulnerability for 2.5 seconds from the start of the cast time, and conjures flaming swords around herself.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Details Divine Judgment's effects persist through the target's death.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata
manual verification of ability timing and execution semantics for context-note normalization

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
